transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Good afternoon. I sent myself a transfer from my other account — two thousand pounds — and it's not showing up. That's a lot of money to have floating around.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand that must be stressful. Can I get your name please?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Mr. Hollis, let me look into this for you. Could you hold for a moment?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for holding. I've just been advised I need to transfer you to our transfers team as they handle payment traces.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Before you transfer me — can you tell me anything? Is there an issue?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I really can't see the full details on my system. The transfers team will sort this out right away.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: How long will I be on hold?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Should be no more than a few minutes. Transferring you now.

planted_violations: failed to verify customer identity before accessing account
transferred call without providing any information or taking preliminary action
did not offer callback option or reference number before transfer
issue left unresolved with no steps taken to reassure customer or set expectations
